calibration_source.scope: grammar0001 delayed-null engineering failure before any atomic candidate result
calibration_source.observed_issue: A five-session forward displacement on two approximately one-month year blocks necessarily loses the last five sessions; event-density compression can remove additional overlapping paths.

FIVE_SESSION_SIGNAL_DELAY.collision_policy: retain earliest mapped signal and drop later overlapping or contract-invalid paths deterministically

derivation: The absolute floor of 30 matches the frozen candidate minimum. The additional 50% fraction prevents a sparse null while remaining feasible after the structural five-of-approximately-twenty-session boundary loss. It is fixed before any grammar0002 PnL, null expectancy, DSR or BH result.
promotion_rule_unchanged: Candidate stress-1.5x expectancy must remain strictly greater than every retained hypothesis-specific null, with all original cost, DSR, BH and ruleset gates unchanged.
CONTRE: Fifty percent can still leave a null less representative than the real opportunity path; the absolute 30-event floor and two other controls reduce but do not eliminate that limitation.
